zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir William Marney於1370年出生在英國艾可萊也 芒尼時，他的父親Sir Robert De Marney51歲，母親Alice Layer20歲。他於1388年7月1日與Elizabeth Sergeaux在英國英格蘭可瓦爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他於1414年住在英國英格蘭艾可萊也 芒尼。他在英國英格蘭艾可被列為high sheriff。他去世於1414年8月21日在英國艾可萊也 芒尼享年44歲，埋葬在英國艾可萊也 芒尼。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir William Marney于1370年出生在英国艾可萊也 芒尼时，他的父亲Sir Robert De Marney51岁，母亲Alice Layer20岁。他于1388年7月1日与Elizabeth Sergeaux在英国英格兰可瓦爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他于1414年住在英国英格兰艾可萊也 芒尼。他在英国英格兰艾可被列为high sheriff。他去世于1414年8月21日在英国艾可萊也 芒尼享年44岁，埋葬在英国艾可萊也 芒尼。

nameMeanings.name: Marney
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Marigny (Manche), so called from the Gallo-Roman personal name Marinius + the locative suffix -acum.
Altered form of French Marnay: habitational name from any of several places in France called Marnay, e.g. in Vienne.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir William Marney was born in 1370, in Layer Marney, Essex, England, his father, Sir Robert De Marney, was 51 and his mother, Alice Layer, was 20. He married Elizabeth Sergeaux on 1 July 1388, in Cornwall, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He lived in Layer Marney, Essex, England, United Kingdom in 1414. His occupation is listed as high sheriff in Essex, England, United Kingdom. He died on 21 August 1414, in Layer Marney, Essex, England, at the age of 44, and was buried in Layer Marney, Essex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir William Marney est né en 1370, à Layer Marney, Essex, Angleterre, son père, Sir Robert De Marney, avait 51 ans et sa mère, Alice Layer, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Sergeaux le 1 juillet 1388, à Cornouailles, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il a vécu à Layer Marney, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni en 1414. Sa profession de son indiquée est high sheriff à Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il est décédé le 21 août 1414, à Layer Marney, Essex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 44 ans, et a été enterré à Layer Marney, Essex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir William Marney 1370 in Layer Marney, Essex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Robert De Marney 51 und seine Mutter Alice Layer 20. Er hat am 1. Juli 1388 in Cornwall, England, United Kingdom Elizabeth Sergeaux geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. 1414 hat er in Layer Marney, Essex, England, United Kingdom gelebt. sein Beruf ist als high sheriff in Essex, England, United Kingdom aufgeführt. Er starb am 21. August 1414 im Alter von 44 Jahren in Layer Marney, Essex, England und wurde in Layer Marney, Essex, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Marney è nato il nel 1370 nel Layer Marney, Essex, England, il suo padre, Sir Robert De Marney, aveva 51 anni e il suo madre, Alice Layer, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Sergeaux il 1 luglio 1388, nel Cornwall, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Vissuto a Layer Marney, Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito nel 1414. La sua occupazione è indicata come high sheriff nel Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Morì il 21 agosto 1414, nel Layer Marney, Essex, England, all'età di 44 anni, e fu sepolto a Layer Marney, Essex, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir William Marneyが1370年にイギリスエセックスレヤー マルニーで生まれた時，父Sir Robert De Marneyは51歳，母Alice Layerは20歳であった。1388年7月1日にイギリスイギリスコルンワルでElizabeth Sergeauxと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1414年にはイギリスイギリスエセックスレヤー マルニーに住んでいた。イギリスイギリスエセックスでの職業はhigh sheriffと記録されている。彼は1414年8月21日にイギリスエセックスレヤー マルニーで44歳で死去し，イギリスエセックスレヤー マルニーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir William Marney(이)가 1370년 영국 에세스 레이어 마니에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Robert De Marney(은)는 51세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Layer(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1388년 7월 1일 영국 잉글랜드 코른월에서 Elizabeth Sergeaux(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 1414년도에 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 레이어 마니에서 살았다. 그의 직업은 영국 잉글랜드 에세스에서 high sheriff이었다. 그는 1414년 8월 21일 영국 에세스 레이어 마니에서 44세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 에세스 레이어 마니에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Marney nasceu em 1370, em Layer Marney, Essex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Robert De Marney, tinha 51 anos e sua mãe, Alice Layer, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Sergeaux em 1 de julho de 1388, em Cornwall, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele viveu em Layer Marney, Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom em 1414. Sua profissão aparece como high sheriff em Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ele faleceu em 21 de agosto de 1414, em Layer Marney, Essex, Inglaterra, com 44 anos, e foi sepultado em Layer Marney, Essex, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir William Marney родился в 1370 г. в местности леиир марни, эссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Robert De Marney было 51 год, а матери, которую звали Alice Layer, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Sergeaux 1 июля 1388 г. в местности корнвалл, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он жил в местности леиир марни, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания в 1414 году.  Он работал по профессии high sheriff в местности эссекс, Англия, Великобритания. Он умер 21 августа 1414 г. в местности леиир марни, эссекс, Англия в возрасте 44 лет и был похоронен в местности леиир марни, эссекс, Англия.

Se casó con Elizabeth Sergeaux el 1 de julio de 1388, en Cornwall, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Vivió en Layer Marney, Essex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido en 1414. Su ocupación registrada era high sheriff en Essex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Murió el 21 de agosto de 1414, en Layer Marney, Essex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 44 años, y fue sepultado en Layer Marney, Essex, Inglaterra.
